executive_summary: CINEOS has identified 2 Telegram channels using 'BCCI' in their names to operate illegal IPL match betting during live matches. Operator phone numbers have been confirmed from publicly posted messages. These channels are linked to the Reddy Anna Book network, subject to active Enforcement Directorate investigation.

phones.source: Publicly posted WhatsApp number in channel
Publicly posted WhatsApp number in channel

channels.evidence: Posted "CSK VS LSG 4/4 SESSION PASS COMPLETE" during Match 53 live
channels.violation: IT Act 66D — cheating by personation of BCCI

channels.evidence: Posted live betting rates during Match 53

operator_profile.ed_case_reference: Reddy Anna Book active ED investigation

what_cineos_can_prove: Both channels use BCCI name without authorisation
Live betting content posted during CSK vs LSG
Network link to Reddy Anna Book confirmed via public channel links
All evidence SHA-256 hashed, IT Act 65B certified
what_cineos_cannot_prove: Legal name of phone owner (requires DoT — police authority)
requested_actions: File FIR under IT Act 66D — cheating by personation of BCCI
Forward phone numbers to I4C for DoT subscriber lookup
Cross-reference with ED Reddy Anna Book investigation
Report to abuse@telegram.org with IT Act 65B evidence
fir_sections: IT Act 2000 Section 66D — cheating by personation
IT Act 2000 Section 66   — fraudulent electronic communication
Public Gambling Act 1867 — illegal betting operation
cineos_offer: CINEOS monitors all IPL match days for BCCI name impersonation. Real-time alerts when new channels appear using BCCI branding. Intelligence feed for BCCI Integrity Unit: Rs 25L/year. Contact: yugandhar@cineos.in
